skills.name: crosscheck
skills.description: Cross-checks a feature between the Android and iOS repos, surfacing discrepancies, missing behavior, or parity gaps. Use proactively when implementing or reviewing a feature to verify cross-platform parity, when unsure how the other platform implemented something, or when the user asks about iOS/Android differences. Invoked explicitly with "/crosscheck FEATURE [--from android|ios] [--branch BRANCH]". Auto-trigger whenever the user asks "how does [platform] do X", "check [platform]", "is this consistent across platforms", or you notice something that might differ between Android and iOS.
